subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by Him through Whom Thou didst raise up the ensigns of Thy guidance and establish the standards of Thy oneness, that [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم اسئلک بالذی به ارفعت اعلام هدایتک و به اقمت رایات فردانیتک بان
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @prayer for protection
